description: Raghoolan Pathy, co-founder of Cast, discusses the future of banking on blockchain, emphasizing the usability of stablecoins and the launch of innovative financial products on Solana.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Raghoolan Pathy introduces Cast's vision for a blockchain-based banking system, highlighting features like interest-free spending, a new Solana card, and the Solid Gold card, which costs over $10,000. The presentation covers the importance of stablecoins and the user experience improvements in crypto finance. [t=14:56] [t=312:04]
